title: Usopp Reaches Cocoyasi
scene: On page 0, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Usopp arrives ahead of the others and gets pulled into the fear surrounding Arlong’s domain.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The real problem is from here. First, let's try to find where Nami docked the ship...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And then cut our way in?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you an idiot!? We don't have the slightest clue what's going on yet!

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
